# Service Delivery Manager — Example Enterprise Services Company

This is synthetic test data. It is not a real opening and must never be treated
as an application.

## Responsibilities

- Own service delivery, SLA performance, and executive client relationships.
- Lead a distributed service desk supporting round-the-clock operations.
- Direct major incident response, escalations, and post-incident reviews.
- Plan service transitions and standardize operational processes.
- Produce KPI reporting and facilitate quarterly business reviews.
- Manage staffing, vendors, and service improvement initiatives.

## Requirements

- Extensive IT service delivery or IT operations leadership experience.
- Experience leading service desk teams and enterprise client engagements.
- Strong ServiceNow, ITSM, SLA, KPI, and incident-management knowledge.
- Clear executive communication and stakeholder-management skills.
- Bachelor's degree.
- PMP certification required.
